zh.Glynn Cornwall: 愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德格林
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn於大約1168年出生在英國可瓦爾。他和Jane De Norwood至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1200年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.Glynn Cornwall: 爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德格林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn于大约1168年出生在英国可瓦爾。他和Jane De Norwood至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1200年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Glynn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Malachy, Dermot, Eamon, Liam, Niall, Ronan, Sean Patrick, Siobhan.
Welsh and Cornish: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Welsh glyn, Cornish glin, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Glynn (Cornwall).
Irish (Galway): shortened form of Gaelic Mag Fhloinn (see McGlynn ).

variants.name: Glines
meanings: Welsh: possibly an altered form of   Glynn  , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: McGlynn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Bridie, Colm, Declan, Donovan, Sean Patrick, Thomas Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Fhloinn, a patronymic from the personal name Flann ‘red, crimson’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn was born about 1168, in Cornwall, England. He had at least 1 son with Jane De Norwood. He died about 1200, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn est né environ 1168, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jane De Norwood. Il est décédé environ 1200, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn wurde um 1168 in Cornwall, England geboren. Er hatte mit Jane De Norwood mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1200 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn è nato il circa 1168 nel Cornwall, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jane De Norwood. Morì circa 1200, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.Glynn Cornwall: アイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードグリン
ja.Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynnは約1168年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた。彼はJane De Norwoodとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1200年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn(은)는 대략 1168년 영국 코른월에서 태어났다. 그는 Jane De Norwood(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn nasceu aproximadamente 1168, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Jane De Norwood. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1200, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Glynn родился около 1168 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jane De Norwood. Он умер около 1200 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

sm.about 1168–about 1200: e tusa o le 1168–e tusa o le 1200
